item.title: Pattern Recogniton and Machine Learning 2
Pattern Recogniton and Machine Learning(1)
item.description: Table of Contents Mathematical notation Mathematical notation An example Polynomial Curve Fitting Polynomial Curve Fitting Polynomial Curve Fitting Polynomial Curve Fitting Polynomial Curve Fitting How to chose \(M\) Regularization My Notes: Regularization Probability Theory(only some important concepts) The Rules of Probability Probability densities Probability densities Multi-variable case Sum rule and product rule Expectations and covariances Expectations and covariances Expectations and covariances Expectations and covariances The Gaussian distribution The Gaussian distribution The Gaussian distribution Back to the example Back to example More Bayes Bayesian curve fitting Decision Theory Information Theory Information Theory Information Theory Information Theory Relative entropy and mutual information Relative entropy and mutual information Relative entropy and mutual information Relative entropy and mutual information
